metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop proficiency in technical drawing and CAD software, creating architectural and engineering drawings. This course emphasizes precision, standards compliance, and use of digital tools for technical design communication.
metadata.general_description: An applied course in technical drawing, CAD software, and professional drawing standards.

big_ideas.statement: Technical drawings communicate design intent precisely, enabling construction and manufacturing of intended objects.
big_ideas.elaboration: Standardized drawing conventions, accurate dimensions, and clear notation enable builders and manufacturers to understand and execute designs.

big_ideas.statement: Computer-aided design (CAD) software enables efficient creation, modification, and documentation of technical designs.
big_ideas.elaboration: Proficiency with CAD tools accelerates design processes and enables creation of complex designs with precision.

big_ideas.statement: Professional drawing standards and conventions ensure consistency and clarity across industries and international contexts.
big_ideas.elaboration: Understanding and applying technical standards enables effective communication among engineers, architects, and craftspeople.

big_ideas.statement: Design visualization and technical representation require integration of 2D and 3D thinking to communicate spatial relationships.
big_ideas.elaboration: Ability to visualize and represent three-dimensional spaces accurately is essential for technical design professions.

competencies.raw: Design technical drawings that communicate design intent clearly
i_can_statements: I can create dimensioned drawings of objects and designs
I can design drawing sets with appropriate views
I can create section and detail drawings
I can design assembly and exploded drawings
I can create architectural floor plans and elevations
I can design site plans and landscape drawings
I can create engineering drawings for mechanical systems
I can design construction drawings with specifications
I can create 3D models from specifications
I can generate 2D views from 3D models
I can design complex assemblies
I can create renderings and visualizations

competencies.raw: Evaluate drawings for accuracy and compliance
i_can_statements: I can assess drawing accuracy and completeness
I can check drawings for standard compliance
I can identify drawing errors and omissions
I can recommend drawing improvements

competencies.raw: Create accurate technical drawings using CAD software
i_can_statements: I can use CAD software to create 2D drawings
I can apply dimensions and annotations
I can organize drawings with layers and groups
I can create drawing templates and standards

competencies.raw: Apply technical drawing standards and conventions
i_can_statements: I can apply line types and weights correctly
I can dimension drawings according to standards
I can create proper view presentations
I can use symbols and annotations appropriately

competencies.raw: Create 3D models and generate technical views
i_can_statements: I can model 3D objects and assemblies
I can extract 2D views from 3D models
I can create section views and details
I can generate bills of materials and schedules

competencies.raw: Produce professional drawing sets and documentation
i_can_statements: I can organize drawings into complete sets
I can create title blocks and drawing borders
I can create and format drawing files for sharing
I can create PDF documents from drawings

competencies.raw: Master CAD software tools and features
i_can_statements: I can use professional CAD software proficiently
I can use advanced drawing and editing tools
I can use parametric and associative drawing features
I can customize CAD software for efficiency
I can use 3D CAD software for modeling
I can create rendered and photo-realistic views
I can use animation and presentation tools
I can work with point clouds and survey data

competencies.raw: Apply specialized drawing tools for architecture and engineering
i_can_statements: I can use Building Information Modeling (BIM) software
I can work with specialized engineering drawing tools
I can use libraries and standards databases
I can integrate multiple design disciplines

competencies.raw: Evaluate emerging design and visualization technologies
i_can_statements: I can assess new CAD and design software
I can understand virtual reality (VR) design tools
I can evaluate cloud-based design platforms
I can identify technology innovations in design

areas.name: CAD Software and Tools
topics: CAD software fundamentals and user interface
